headline: Congress Passes Law Making It Illegal To Say 'Actually' In Meetings, Nobody Follows It
summary: 'Actually, I think the law is flawed,' one senator said. 'Actually, it's a great law,' another said.
fullBody: Congress passed a law making it illegal to say 'actually' in meetings. 'Actually, this is a great law,' one senator said. 'Actually, I disagree,' another said. The law is unenforceable. 'Actually, no one follows it,' a staffer said. The law has been ignored. 'Actually, it was a waste of time,' one senator said. The law is still on the books. Actually, no one cares.
